description: You are a Data Analyst at a digital media distributor. Management needs a year-over-year revenue analysis by music genre for the period 2009–2013 using the SQLite database at '/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_crosstab.db' (connection name: 'ChinookCrosstab'). Create a persistent table named 'genre_yearly_revenue' that pivots revenue (UnitPrice * Quantity) by year from the Invoice table. The table must include columns GenreName, Rev_2009, Rev_2010, Rev_2011, Rev_2012, Rev_2013, and TotalRevenue, sorted by TotalRevenue descending. Create a database index named 'idx_genre_total_revenue' on the TotalRevenue column. Export the resulting table to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/genre_yearly_revenue.csv' and save the SQL script containing the table and index creation statements to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/genre_crosstab.sql'.
